Episodes.Title: Chapter 1: The Dark Revenge
Episodes.Director: Steward Lee, Brad Rau, Saul Ruiz
Episodes.Writer: George Lucas, Matt Michnovetz, Amanda Rose Muñoz
Episodes.Actors: Sam Witwer, Ben Diskin, Brandon Blum
Episodes.Plot: In the criminal underworld of Janix, Maul enacts a plan to consolidate his power.

Episodes.Title: Chapter 2: Sinister Schemes
Episodes.Writer: George Lucas, Matt Michnovetz, Amanda Rose Muñoz
Episodes.Actors: Sam Witwer, Andrew Kishino, Avery Kidd Waddell
Episodes.Plot: Maul seeks to enlighten his new prisoners while Lawson pursues him.

Episodes.Title: Chapter 3: Whispers in the Unknown
Episodes.Writer: George Lucas, Julia Cooperman, Amanda Rose Muñoz
Episodes.Actors: Sam Witwer, Charlie Bushnell, Chris Diamantopoulos
Episodes.Plot: As Maul's plans come together, Devon considers her options.

Episodes.Title: Chapter 4: Pride and Vengeance
Episodes.Actors: Sam Witwer, Avery Kidd Waddell, Chris Diamantopoulos
Episodes.Plot: A confrontation between Lawson and Maul threatens everyone.

Episodes.Title: Chapter 5: Inquisition
Episodes.Director: Tatyana Drewry Carvin, Brad Rau, Saul Ruiz
Episodes.Writer: George Lucas, Jennifer Corbett, Amanda Rose Muñoz
Episodes.Actors: Sam Witwer, Gideon Adlon, Keiko Agena
Episodes.Plot: Captain Lawson faces a sobering new reality.

Episodes.Title: Chapter 6: Night of the Hunted
Episodes.Writer: George Lucas, Christopher Yost, Amanda Rose Muñoz
Episodes.Actors: Sam Witwer, Gideon Adlon, Pamela Adlon
Episodes.Plot: Pushed to their breaking point, our heroes have no choice but to run.
